title: Mexican Free-for-All
original_title: クレージーメキシコ大作戦
overview: The eleventh film in the comedy series starring Japan's leading comedy group, the Crazy Cats. Susumu Sakamori and his friends travel to Mexico to find a stone statue that contains the location of the secret treasure "Olmeca".

trailers.title: Kureji Mekishiko dai sakusen (1968) ORIGINAL TRAILER
